news.title: Badgers buckle down for finals
news.summary_en: In study pods, on the Terrace, at the libraries and everywhere in between, Badgers are getting ready for the semester's last hurdle: finals.

news.title: History scholar Stephen Kantrowitz awarded Andrew Carnegie Fellowship
news.summary_en: Kantrowitz is one of 24 scholars the Carnegie Corporation of New York selected from among 381 nominations across the country.

news.title: UW’s Public Tech Media Lab helps bridge the gap between AI and journalism
news.summary_en: Led by journalism professor Tomás Dodds, the new lab has partnered with local newsrooms to help them develop AI guidelines and systems that adhere to core reporting values and standards.

news.title: UW–Madison finalizes 2025–27 compensation strategy
news.summary_en: The strategy is intended to support the university’s total compensation philosophy, which is to be a market-competitive employer that supports UW staff and faculty.

news.title: Badgers head to Wisconsin’s capitol
news.summary_en: The annual UW–Madison Day at the State Capitol highlighted the university's economic power and campus momentum.

news.title: 48 faculty honored with Vilas professorships and awards
news.summary_en: The awards recognize standout research, teaching and service.

news.title: 4 UW scholars honored with Vilas Research Professorships
news.summary_en: New Vilas Research Professors include leaders in study of cells, public opinion, sustainable chemistry and computational optimization
